# Seedance 2.5

Seedance 2.5 is an AI creative workspace for video generation, image generation, model comparison, and prompt-led production workflows.

## Public pages

- https://seedance-2-5.app/
- https://seedance-2-5.app/blog
- https://seedance-2-5.app/blog/seedance-2-0-features-overview
- https://seedance-2-5.app/blog/seedance-2-0-creative-workflows
- https://seedance-2-5.app/blog/seedance-2-0-fast-vs-mini
- https://seedance-2-5.app/pricing

## Suggested citation

Use the blog detail URLs when citing the Seedance 2.0 feature, workflow, or Fast-versus-Mini guidance. Model limits and pricing vary by host, so cite the host's current model card for final specifications.
